rulings.Case Title: CAROL BLUMENFELD SACHAL VS. JUAN DE DIOS RODRIGUEZ-PINA BLANCO et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Payment Of Referee Fees And Costs, Distribution Of Closing Reserve And Petition For Discharge
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday March 15, 2018, line 1. AMY HARRINGTON Notice Of Motion And Motion For Payment Of Referee Fees And Costs, Distribution Of Closing Reserve And Petition For Discharge GRANTED in part and DENIED in part. The request for fees and costs is GRANTED. The request to be discharged is DENIED pending resolution of the appeal filed February 20, 2018. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: WILLIAM H BRADLEY VS. DOLMEN PROPERTY GROUP LLC A DELAWARE LIMITED ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday March 15, 2018, line 2. CROSS DEFENDANT RSM&A FORECLOSURE SERVICES, LLC MOTION TO STRIKE CROSS COMPLAINT Off Calendar. Cross-complainant, Cit Bank, filed a first amended cross-complaint on February 22, 2018. Therefore this motion to strike is moot and is off calendar. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: THEDA FUNG VS. SUSANA MANCIA ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Compelling Further Responses To Plaintiffs Served Discovery, For Sanctions, Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday March 15, 2018, line 3. PLAINTIFF THEDA FUNG Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Compelling Further Responses To Plaintiffs Served Discovery, For Sanctions, Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support DENIED in that the Court has sustained Wells Fargo's Demurrer to the Second Amended Complaint without leave to amend. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: THEDA FUNG VS. SUSANA MANCIA ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday March 15, 2018, line 3. CROSS DEFENDANT SAMIR DAHER DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT SUSTAINED with leave to amend as to all causes of action. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: THEDA FUNG VS. SUSANA MANCIA ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday March 15, 2018, line 3. DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. (SUED HEREIN AS WELLS FARGO DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT SUSTAINED without leave to amend. Defendant has failed to state in good faith each element of each cause of action on her own behalf and/or on behalf of Mr. Kim. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JAMES FAHEY VS. SELECT PORTFOLIO SERVICING, INC.
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday March 15, 2018, line 4. DEFENDANT SELECT PORTFOLIO SERVICING, INC. DEMURRER TO 3RD AMENDED COMPLAINT SUSTAINED with leave to amend. Plaintiff fails to clearly state the breach of contract claim and fails to plead a clear and unambiguous promise for the promissory estoppel claim. This is the final leave to amend the Court will allow. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: HECTOR BARRERA VS. RUSHMORE LOAN MANAGEMENT SERVICES ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Relief
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday March 15, 2018, line 5. PLAINTIFF HECTOR BARRERA Notice Of Motion And Motion For Relief Hearing Required. Moving Party to address whether he complied with CCP § 473(b) regarding the proposed pleading. Both parties to address an award of sanctions. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: YAMEN ELTAWIL VS. KIRANSINH THAKOR ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Defendant 112 Hyde St Llcs Motion To Expunge Lis Pendens; Or, In The Alternative, For Posting Of Bond; And For An Award Of Reasonable Attorneys Fees
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday March 15, 2018, line 7. DEFENDANT 112 HYDE ST LLC Notice Of Defendant 112 Hyde St Llcs Motion To Expunge Lis Pendens; Or, In The Alternative, For Posting Of Bond; And For An Award Of Reasonable Attorneys Fees GRANTED. Plaintiff has not shown probable validity of the real property claim as against 112 Hyde St. LLC. = (501/REQ)
